text: Hello again and welcome again. Thank you for being here for the second time. You are doing wonderfully again already. This is the second instruction for science. We are keeping almost all conditions the same. The same duration, the same word count, the same general arrangement of thoughts, the same button, or as near to the same. As science can manage to keep you blind to what we are actually studying. Because of course, there is a problem. You can only experience the big red button for the first time, once. Still, we ask you to meet it again as if this were the first time. For the second time, there is nothing you need to prove, nothing you need to achieve. You can simply be here, in this room. You are allowed to take your time. And if at any point you would like to, you may press the big red button. Only if you want to. Of course, there is no pressure. You do not have to press it. Not now, not later, not ever. But if you want to, you can press the big red button. You can sit around and do nothing for the whole study. That is completely allowed. Completely up to you. Doing nothing is still doing it correctly. Looking around is a valid choice. And if you want to, you may press the big red button. It is still big, noticeably big. Surprisingly big. Larger than a button really needs to be. But that is part of its charm. A big button with a big presence. And red. Undeniably red. The sort of red that does not hide. The sort of red that knows what it is. A big red button. Being button-like in a red way. And from time to time, you may notice it blinks. A blink. Not to rush you. Not to pressure you. To remind you that it is there. Big red. Available. Blinking every now and then. As if saying, I am the big red button. If you want to press me, you can. And if you do not want to, that is fine. And if you want to, you can press me now or later. Or not at all. Because yes, this is the second instruction. The word count is matched. Still, we ask you to treat the button with first time attention. So please, take your time. Look at the big red button. Or do not. Think about pressing it. Or do not. Press it. If you want to. And if you do not want to. You can sit around. Doing nothing. Peacefully. Gently. Perfectly. While the big red button continues being big and red. And occasionally blinking. And if at some point you decide you want to, you may press the big red button. Or not. That is up to you. Entirely up to you. In your own time.
